title: Trimmer Line 3MMX15M – Durable Nylon Strimmer Wire for Precision Grass Cutting – Universal Fit for Electric & Cordless Trimmers
features: Heavy-Duty Nylon Material – Made from premium-quality nylon for superior strength, durability, and flexibility. Ideal for tackling tough grass and weeds.
Efficient Cutting – The perfect balance between durability and flexibility, ensuring clean and precise cuts for both light and heavy-duty trimming tasks.
15-Meter Length – Provides ample line to keep your trimmer running longer, reducing the need for frequent replacements.
Universal Compatibility – Fits most electric, battery-powered, and petrol grass trimmers and brush cutters. A versatile replacement line for various strimming jobs.
Tangle-Free & Easy to Install – Designed for hassle-free winding and smooth feeding, minimizing downtime during use.
Multi-Purpose Use – Ideal for home gardens, lawns, landscaping, and professional trimming tasks.
Bright & Visible Color – Highly visible design makes it easy to track the remaining line while in use or in storage.
Weather-Resistant & Durable – Withstands various weather conditions, maintaining strength and performance over time.
description: Upgrade your garden maintenance with the BRIGHT & HOMELY 3MM x 15M Trimmer Line . Crafted from premium-grade nylon , this strimmer cord offers exceptional strength, durability, and flexibility to handle both light trimming and heavy-duty cutting. The 3mm thickness ensures efficient cutting performance , delivering clean, precise results on grass, weeds, and even stubborn overgrowth. With a 15-meter length , you'll have plenty of line for multiple uses without constant replacements. Key Features: ✔ Durable Nylon – Strong, long-lasting material ✔ 3mm Thickness – Clean & precise cutting ✔ 15m Length – Extended use, less replacement ✔ Universal Fit – Works with most trimmers ✔ Tangle-Free – Easy to install & smooth feeding ✔ Heavy-Duty – Cuts grass, weeds & overgrowt.

specifications_table.Power source type: ‎itself does not have a power source, as it is a replacement cutting line for grass trimmers.
